description: Likely scales, tiles, or extends a visible pattern to a larger output. Colors are preserved as a set, though positions may change. Primary structural cue: size expansion. Inferred transformation family: scale/tile/extend.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_46442a0e(I):
    x1 = rot90(I)
    x2 = rot180(I)
    x3 = rot270(I)
    x4 = hconcat(I, x1)
    x5 = hconcat(x3, x2)
    O = vconcat(x4, x5)
    return O
